title: deyeuxia × hartmaniana
intro: Deyeuxia × hartmaniana, also known as Hartmann's grass, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the grass family and is native to China. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Deyeuxia × hartmaniana include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
